title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 19 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 19 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 19 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/09/2024
Today, iron ore rebounded from its bottom and ﬂuctuated upward throughout the day. The most-traded contract I2501 finally closedat 693 yuan/ mt, with a daily increase of 1.69%. Speculative trading among traders increased; steel mills mainly remained on the sidelines, with some planning tenders.
